  "claims": [
    "California has the largest veteran population in the nation, totaling nearly 1.8 million veterans.",
    "In 2017, 67% of California veterans were unsheltered, compared to 38% of homeless veterans in other parts of the U.S.",
    "Veterans in California are disproportionately represented among the homeless population.",
    "California veterans face greater mental health, substance abuse, and employment challenges compared to their peers.",
